  • Method Details

    • accountId

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder accountId(String accountId)
      The identifier of the account transacting this order

    • assetType

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder assetType(BasketOrderCreateAssetType assetType)
      The type of the asset in this order

    • clientOrderId

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder clientOrderId(String clientOrderId)
      User-supplied unique order ID. Cannot be more than 40 characters long.

    • clientOrderReceivedTime

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder clientOrderReceivedTime(OffsetDateTime clientOrderReceivedTime)
      Time the order request was received by the client. Must be in the past.

    • clientOrderReceivedTime

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder clientOrderReceivedTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> clientOrderReceivedTime)
      Time the order request was received by the client. Must be in the past.

    • currencyCode

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder currencyCode(String currencyCode)
      Defaults to "USD". Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

    • currencyCode

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder currencyCode(Optional<String> currencyCode)
      Defaults to "USD". Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

    • identifier

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder identifier(String identifier)
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifierType

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder identifierType(BasketOrderCreateIdentifierType identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset being ordered. For Equities: only SYMBOL is supported For Mutual Funds: only SYMBOL and CUSIP are supported

    • maxSellQuantity

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder maxSellQuantity(DecimalCreate maxSellQuantity)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • maxSellQuantity

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder maxSellQuantity(Optional<? extends DecimalCreate> maxSellQuantity)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • notionalValue

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder notionalValue(DecimalCreate notionalValue)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • notionalValue

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder notionalValue(Optional<? extends DecimalCreate> notionalValue)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • orderType

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder orderType(BasketOrderCreateOrderType orderType)
      The execution type of this order.

    • quantity

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder quantity(DecimalCreate quantity)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • quantity

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder quantity(Optional<? extends DecimalCreate> quantity)
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • side

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder side(BasketOrderCreateSide side)
      The side of this order.

    • specialReportingInstructions

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder specialReportingInstructions(List<BasketOrderCreateSpecialReportingInstructions> specialReportingInstructions)
      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • specialReportingInstructions

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder specialReportingInstructions(Optional<? extends List<BasketOrderCreateSpecialReportingInstructions>> specialReportingInstructions)
      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • timeInForce

      public BasketOrderCreate.Builder timeInForce(BasketOrderCreateTimeInForce timeInForce)
      Must be the value "DAY". Regulatory requirements dictate that the system capture the intended time_in_force, which is why this a mandatory field.

    • build

      public BasketOrderCreate build()
